title: Spyre drug for inflammatory bowel disease shows promise in early study
content: The therapy, which works similarly to Takeda’s blockbuster Entyvio, showed remission rates that suggest a “best-in-class” profile, the company said.

title: Connected medical devices: Smarter care starts here
content: Connected medical devices are transforming healthcare and clinical trials, driving advances in patient care and next-gen therapies shaping the future.
